name: Selectivity Matters: Source Node Influence Pruning for Unsupervised Graph Domain Adaptation

description: arXiv:2607.17668v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Unsupervised Graph Domain Adaptation (UGDA) aims to facilitate knowledge transfer from a labeled source graph to an unlabeled target graph by mitigating cross-domain distribution shifts. Existing methods primarily focus on node-level feature alignment in latent spaces, relying on the implicit assumption that all source nodes contribute positivel...
author: Ridong Han, Yawen Shen, Zhongnian Li, Tongfeng Sun, Xinzheng Xu, Abdulmotaleb El Saddik
